category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes CurlFtpFS as an FTP filesystem using cURL and FUSE.
source_facts.description says curlftpfs is a filesystem for accessing FTP hosts based on FUSE and libcurl.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and official project page style the project as CurlFtpFS.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is the best available official documentation surface for CurlFtpFS.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official SourceForge project code browser.
tags_sources: Official homepage repeats the FTP filesystem purpose.
source_facts.description explicitly mentions FTP hosts, FUSE, and libcurl.
